metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The land sleeps under an enchantment. Gather the awakening crystals from the dungeons and bring them to the shrine in Thornmarch to break the spell.

moongate 4.name: Moongate
moongate 4.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say. sweet bruh.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Thornmarch
towns.description: A forest clearing settlement where druids and woodsmen live side by side.

key_dungeons.name: Sunken Stronghold
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Sunken Stronghold gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Sunken Stronghold for the hidden Copper Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.
